content:
I am a graduate student of Copernicus Master in Digital Earth; my first year (Earth Observation and Geoinfomatics) in the University of Salzburg, Austria and second year (GeoData Science) in the University of Southern Brittany, France.
I had my first degree in Remote Sensing and Geoscience Information System at the Federal University of Technology Akure, Nigeria.
Welcome to my e-portfolio!!!
–
summary: I am a graduate student of Copernicus Master in Digital Earth; my first year (Earth Observation and Geoinfomatics) in the University of Salzburg, Austria and second year (GeoData Science) in the University of Southern Brittany, France.
title: Adebowale Daniel Adebayo
